gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 high-reasoning review approved with no findings; residual risk is additive fixture manifest actions_json fields under schema v1 for external exact-key consumers.
what_changed: Engine-probe fixtures now write a validated connector-actions JSON sidecar next to the handoff and payload.
Fixture manifests include actions JSON URI/path/checksum metadata for downstream adapter debugging.
README and Databricks engine-probe template docs describe the complete fixture bundle.
why: Give vLLM/SGLang native adapter implementers a static reserve/copy/bind/release descriptor before running real block-manager probes.
